name: oh-my-copilot
description: GitHub Copilot project skills catalog and Jira handoff tools.

scripts.check:catalog: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js catalog validate
scripts.catalog:list: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js catalog list
scripts.project:inspect: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js project inspect
scripts.lint:skills: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js lint:skills --root .
scripts.sync:dry-run: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js sync:dry-run --root .
scripts.jira:dry-run: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js jira:dry-run --root .
